ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Enter your password
(Obsidian Translate)

Recover encrypted API keys from your settings by entering your password.

You can reopen this modal via the plugin settings at any time.
ast.target:
Enter your password
(Obsidian Translate)

Recover encrypted API keys from your settings by entering your password.

You can reopen this modal via the plugin settings at any time.

ast.target: If the online glossary does not support a specific language pair, or if the service does not support online glossaries at all, glossary entries can be applied locally if `Local Glossary` setting is enabled

ast.target: Automatic language detection is disabled, install FastText to enable this feature
